---
name: Council definition request
about: Propose a new council, or a change to an existing one
labels: council-definition
---

**Council**
<!-- New council name, or the id of an existing one to change. -->

**Convene it for**
<!-- The class of decision this council governs. -->

**Mode**
- [ ] advisory (recommends; a human decides)
- [ ] action-gate (the verdict can gate the action)

**Lenses (roster)**
<!-- Which perspectives, and what each one's job is. Reuse the six canonical lenses where you can. -->

**Decision outcomes**
<!-- e.g. approve / reject / defer / escalate -->

**Fail-closed rule**
<!-- What happens in the uncertain / high-impact case? It must resolve toward caution / a human. -->

**Why a council (not a single agent)?**
<!-- Selective plurality: why is this consequential / uncertain / adversarial enough to convene a council? -->
